metadata.title: Karma Chameleon (Remastered 2002)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:13.36] There's the loving in your eyes all the way

[00:49.44] You come and go
[00:52.04] You come and go
[00:55.74] Loving would be easy if your colors were like my dreams
